series_metadata.series_description: Documents associated with job posting and records relating to application for employment with DAS by those not hired for the job for which they applied. These are not documents in an employee file. List of document types in this record series include, but are not limited to, Anonymous/Layoff List-Vacancy, Candidate Acknowledgements, Candidate Application, Candidate Correspondence, Checklist, External Recruitment , Hiring Control Approval-Vacancy, Interview Documents, Interview/Testing Schedules, Job Analysis Documents, Job Posting, Other Vacancy Documents, Position Requisition, Recruitment Analyses Reports, Application, Reference/Background/Employee History Report, Selection/Offer Approvals, Test Documents.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: scanned electronically ; Electronic: vacancy filled or canceled
